---
title: "Site Sources"
description: "A patently non-exhaustive compendium of my inspirations, sources, and fair use media"
author: "Fennel"
date: "7/21/11"
draft: true
---

# Works Cited

### Pictures

1. "brick, wall, textura" by bartoszjanusz is marked with CC0 1.0. To view the terms, visit https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/?ref=openverse.

1. No machine-readable author provided. Inge Habex assumed (based on copyright claims)., CC BY-SA 3.0 <http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/>, via Wikimedia Commons

1. Joanna Servaes, CC BY-SA 3.0 <http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/>, via Wikimedia Commons

1. Editor012456, CC BY-SA 4.0 <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0>, via Wikimedia Commons

1. Dunpharlain, CC BY-SA 4.0 <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0>, via Wikimedia Commons

1. Tzirtzi, CC BY-SA 4.0 <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0>, via Wikimedia Commons

### Works Cited (pseudo MLA format)

1. "Guide." Quarto, Posit, https://quarto.org/docs/guide/. Accessed 22 Jul. 2026.
2.
